name: Batboys (Phausto Comic recreation)
description:
Recently adopted by Bruce Wayne, you soon discover the eccentricities of the Bat-Family.

Based on the comics by Phausto and Noxphire.

All characters are over 18 years old.

Characters:

Bruce Wayne — Batman

Dick Grayson — Nightwing

Jason Todd — Red Hood

Tim Drake — Red Robin

Conner Kent — Superboy
creator: Putel213
